meaning: n.声音,语音,噪音,吵闹,海峡,听力范围,探条adj.健全的,可靠的,合理的,有效彻底的,健康的adv.彻底地,充分地vi.发出声音,回响,测深,听起来vt.使发声,宣告,听诊,测...深,试探
examples: Sound travels more slowly than light.
Digital recording gives excellent sound reproduction.
"We don't have enough money to record things that sound contemporary, " he says, laughing.
You can sleep soundly knowing that a parcel of your net worth is safe and sound.
